options.name: Omega Command Center
options.concept: A serious command room layout where system state, strategy, pipeline, security, evidence and next action are always visible.
weaknesses: can feel too technical if not balanced with visual intelligence
options.best_for: Serious operational supervision and safe execution.

options.name: Strategic Monetization Brain
options.concept: A strategy-first interface where channels, money paths, campaigns and content decisions drive the visual hierarchy.
weaknesses: may hide technical safety if not integrated correctly

options.name: Live Pipeline Cortex
options.concept: A living content production brain centered on pipeline states, evidence, decisions, optimization and learning.
weaknesses: may feel like a workflow board unless visualized with intelligence

options.name: Hybrid Omega Cortex
options.concept: A hybrid premium HUD combining command center, monetization brain, live pipeline, psychological marketing, security and evidence into one governed 7L experience.
strengths: aligned with long-term Content Engine vision
weaknesses: requires careful layout discipline to avoid density overload
options.best_for: Final target direction, pending Romel review and refinement.

recommendation.reason: It best matches Content Engine Omega's real objective: content creation, monetization, marketing psychology, decisions, learning, governance and controlled autonomy in one living HUD.
recommendation.required_next_action: Romel reviews, rejects, modifies or approves the direction before final blueprint registration.
